title: PEER SUPPORT - 211info
text: SOCC PEER SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer support for mental health, addiction, trauma and stress. Provides one-on-one support, support groups, and phones that are available seven days a week for texting or calling. There are eighteen different groups per week. 280 NE Santiam Boulevard Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4pm Email (971) 732-8668 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (971) 732-8668 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities Detroit, Gates, Idanha, Lyons, Mill City, Marion, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Services: Emotional Issues Support Groups General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups In Person Support Groups Mental Health Related Support Groups Talklines/Warmlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOCC
